title: Dashboard
subtitle: Here's what's happening with your AI workforce today.

gettingStarted.title: Your AI workforce is ready
gettingStarted.subtitle: Get started in under a minute — describe what you need and let your team take it from here.
gettingStarted.describeGoalDesc: Chat with the Secretary — it will assemble a team and break down tasks
gettingStarted.hireAgentsDesc: Browse templates: developers, researchers, writers, analysts, and more
gettingStarted.createProjectDesc: Set up requirements and let agents plan, execute, and deliver

checklist.title: Get Started with Markus
checklist.subtitle: Follow these steps to set up your AI workforce and start working.

setup.title: System Setup
setup.llmDesc: Set up your LLM provider API key — this is required for agents to work
setup.searchDesc: Set up a search API key so agents can search the internet
setup.browserDesc: Install the Chrome extension to let agents control the browser

explore.title: Start Exploring
explore.greetDesc: Meet your AI secretary and learn what it can do for you
explore.projectDesc: Let Secretary create an exploration project for you
explore.requirementsDesc: Add requirements to your project — agents will break them into tasks
explore.agentDesc: Hire a specialized agent like a researcher, developer, or analyst
explore.teamDesc: Group agents into a team to collaborate on complex tasks

heroBanner.title: Build. Collaborate. Scale.
heroBanner.subtitle: Markus is your AI workforce platform. Deploy specialized agents, automate complex tasks, and achieve more together.

attention.title: Needs Your Attention
attention.allClear: All clear — nothing needs your attention right now.

teamStatus.title: Team Status
teamStatus.noTeams: No teams yet. Create a team or hire agents to get started.
